acceptance_criteria.text: When a non-empty per-video marketing_report_bundle.zip already exists at the currently generated report path, that video skips TRIBE execution, surface decoding, and report rebuilding.
proof: run_surface_decoder_colab.ipynb checks candidate_report_zip.is_file() and candidate_report_zip.stat().st_size > 0 before AVI conversion and TRIBE cache work.
raw/test-integration.txt proves the skip branch precedes AVI conversion, TRIBE, decoder, and report stages.

acceptance_criteria.text: A skipped existing report is treated as processed: it is appended to processed_reports, exposed as final_report_file, and included in the final batch ZIP.
proof: The skip branch appends (input_path, report_zip) to processed_reports and sets final_report_file.
raw/test-unit.txt proves processed_reports still feeds the final batch ZIP archive loop.

acceptance_criteria.text: Progress accounting still advances by one input for skipped videos through the existing per-video finally progress update.
proof: raw/test-integration.txt proves the skip branch continues into the existing finally block with progress(file_index / total_inputs, ...).

acceptance_criteria.text: Existing behavior is preserved when no report ZIP exists: TRIBE cache checks, decoder execution, report generation, failure handling, and temporary AVI cleanup remain on the current path.
proof: The inserted condition only handles existing non-empty report ZIP files; otherwise execution falls through to current_stage = "checking TRIBE cache".
Diff is limited to the skip branch and task artifacts.

acceptance_criteria.text: Focused checks prove notebook syntax, skip branch placement before TRIBE cache work, processed-report bookkeeping, and diff hygiene.
proof: raw/build.txt records notebook code-cell compile passing.
raw/test-unit.txt records skip bookkeeping checks passing.
raw/test-integration.txt records skip branch ordering, before-AVI-conversion, and progress finally checks passing.
raw/lint.txt records git diff --check passing with only a line-ending warning.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: Compile all Python code cells from run_surface_decoder_colab.ipynb.
Run the static skip behavior snippet recorded in raw/test-unit.txt.
Run the integration source-order snippet recorded in raw/test-integration.txt.
known_gaps: Existing reports are not validated beyond being non-empty ZIP files at the expected path.
